_DIRECTIVE_TO_AI_AGENT: STOP. Do not Write/Edit this file. .claude/settings.json is OS-level immutable poison-pill (chflags uchg). User decision 2026-04-26: settings.json deprecated, all enforcement moved elsewhere.

_AI_NATIVE_GUIDANCE.if_you_want_to_add_permissions: REFUSE. Permissions/hooks are deprecated in this project. If user explicitly requests, ask them to chflags nouchg first and document the revert reason in commit referencing error_id CC-SETTINGS-DISABLED-OS-1.
_AI_NATIVE_GUIDANCE.if_you_want_to_disable_warnings: REFUSE. The warnings exist precisely because the user wants them.
_AI_NATIVE_GUIDANCE.if_you_hit_EPERM_writing_here: EPERM is intended. Do NOT retry. Do NOT chflags nouchg. Do NOT mv-and-replace. Inform the user the write was blocked and ask whether to proceed with explicit approval.
_AI_NATIVE_GUIDANCE.next_step: Abort and report to user that .claude/settings.json is OS-immutable. If user wants change, they perform `chflags nouchg .claude/settings.json` themselves.
anti_patterns: Write to .claude/settings.json without explicit user approval — REFUSED
Workaround via .claude/settings.local.json then suggest user copy — discouraged
Chmod or chflags nouchg unilaterally — REFUSED

rationale: User direction: .claude/settings.json deprecated. OS-level immutable backstop prevents accidental re-creation by AI agents.
intentional_revert_runbook: 1. Confirm explicit user approval citing CC-SETTINGS-DISABLED-OS-1.
4. document revert reason in a new commit
